record.field: excise_taxes = env["account.tax"].search([('x_is_excise', '=', True)]) records.write({'taxes_id': [Command.link(id) for id in excise_taxes.filtered(lambda t: t.type_tax_use == 'sale').ids], 'supplier_taxes_id': [Command.link(id) for id in excise_taxes.filtered(lambda t: t.type_tax_use == 'purchase').ids]})

excise_taxes = env["account.tax"].search([('x_is_excise', '=', True)]) records.write({'taxes_id': [Command.unlink(id) for id in excise_taxes.filtered(lambda t: t.type_tax_use == 'sale').ids], 'supplier_taxes_id': [Command.unlink(id) for id in excise_taxes.filtered(lambda t: t.type_tax_use == 'purchase').ids]})
